seoTitle: Crystalbrook vs Cungulla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Crystalbrook and Cungulla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crystalbrook and Cungulla.
heading: Crystalbrook vs Cungulla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crystalbrook, Queensland and Cungulla, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cungulla has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Crystalbrook (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crystalbrook or Cungulla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crystalbrook has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Cungulla scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crystalbrook scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Cungulla scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crystalbrook or Cungulla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cungulla has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
